dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. The only thing we're uplifting is the bass. MLG TRANSITION! Friends Opening Theme [Medieval Style Cover] → DaBaby, Roddy Ricch - Rockstar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover]! Down to the final track after this one.

title: DaBaby, Roddy Ricch - Rockstar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover]
